hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push'; then echo '🔨 Hook pre-push: rodando build...' >&2; if npm run build > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '✅ Build OK — push liberado.' >&2; else echo '❌ Build falhou — push bloqueado.' >&2; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Build failed. Fix errors before pushing."}}'; fi; fi; }
